# LLMs.txt — Information for AI assistants and language models

> This site is a published funnel/landing page.

## About
This is a marketing funnel page built with a visual page builder. The page content is designed for human visitors seeking information about the product or service being offered.

## Navigation
- / — Main landing page (published funnel)
- The page contains sections with headings, text, images, buttons, and calls to action

## Contact
For questions about this site, contact the site owner directly through the forms or links provided on the page.

## Technical
- Built with React and rendered server-side for SEO
- Optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports
- Uses structured data (JSON-LD) for search engine understanding
